result:
Successfully completed the data cleaning task. The cleaned dataset has been created at data/output/cleaned_data.csv with the following specifications:

- 16,111 rows (full join of all 5 input datasets)
- 4 variables: NSID, imd15, imd16, imd32
- Variable naming follows conventions (imd prefix with age suffixes)
- Missing values harmonized: -94 recoded to -8, NA recoded to -3
- All deprivation scores retained as continuous numeric variables
- Output written using write_csv() with row.names = FALSE

The script loaded all 5 tab-delimited files from data/input/, merged them by NSID using full_join, selected and renamed the deprivation variables (IMDRSCORE from waves 2 and 3 to imd15 and imd16, W9DIMDD from ns9_2022 to imd32), harmonized missing value codes, and wrote the final cleaned dataset to data/output/cleaned_data.csv.
